posts.author: Arseny (Arseny Bandurin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi!
I have situations in my tables where the same coordinates are assigned to different objects. If I switch on the ‘map’ view mode, such objects are grouped and displayed as a circle with the number of elements. When I click on the circle, nothing happens.
How can I get information about what elements are grouped behind these circles?
You can see the problem in the video:

There is no way to get information on them from the map. Not even to understand the exact address to manually filter on the map.

posts.author: ZakiImtiaz (Zaki | readylogic.co)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Arseny,
I found it working o my system. But still there are some flaws in monday.com maps. To overcome that you can use the Maps available in the market place. Hope this solves your problem.

In case you need any help setting it up let me know here and I’ll be happy to assist.

Zaki

Business Workflow Consultant

Ready Logic
